post_rendered:
Mafia Game 204!
Justack Town (of) e!

  • Rules
    • Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • Do not post at night.
    • You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me, including role PMs.
    • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • Day chat will be enabled via QuickTopic.
    • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
    • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • Do not imitate the mods.
  • Voting/Hanging
    • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Type usernames exactly. There is one exception, l and I are treated as the same.
    • Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
    • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though you have the ability to do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • If the deadline is met the player with the most votes is hanged. If there is a tie the player who received the votes first is hanged. If No Hang is part of the tie, No Hang occurs.
    • Starting day 1, If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • Starting day 1, If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • The moment the deadline passes, it will be twilight and no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
    • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • Once I (or the comod) post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • Each day will be 240 hours (10 days). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
    • The deadlines will be based on Central Timezone.
    • The deadline will occur the very second 240 hours has occurred.
    • The night deadline will be 48 hours after night begins.
    • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
    • Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
    • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, you will receive an in-game prod.
    • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
    • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, or a player has received too many PM prods, he/she will be replaced, unless you post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette
    • Do not use inappropriate language.
    • Do not make any personal attacks.
    • Follow all of the rules.
    • Be mature.
    • For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she may be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • I (NDMath) am the moderator of Mafia Game 204. Made_in_2004 is the comod of Mafia Game 204.
    • This brown (#974E03) is my mod color. Do not post in anything too similar. This orange (#ff9a00) is Made_in_2004's mod color. Do not post in anything too similar.
    • The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount.
    • The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules. The co-mod the second to last say.

  • Read all of the rules
Story
Justack was a small town, located inside the province of e. The people, in the small town of just 14, had reason to believe that three of them had joined the mafia, primarily based on some of the graffiti left behind. There were also rumours that a maniac, from the neighboring province of had snuck in looking to cause harm.

Will the people of Justack be able to save the town in time?


Setup
Setup is closed. It is guaranteed to be either 11:3 or 10:3:1 as the town:mafia ratio, and in the latter the 1 is a serial killer.

This game uses Reasonable Action Resolution.
No action may self target unless otherwise stated. By default, all mafia and serial killer are multi-tasking, meaning they may do more than one action on a single night.

There is no flavor inside role pm's.
Vanilla Townie wrote:
You are a Vanilla Townie. You have no night abilities. Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name.

You win when all non-town players are dead, and there's at least one townie alive.

Notable Stuff

mathjay replaces kevinmathz; Night 1 ends; Day 2 begins.
Game End

Day 1 Deadline is June 8th at 5:00 pm Central. Majority is enabled.
Day 2 Deadline is June 20th at 2:30 pm Central.

post_rendered:
The official announcement will be out soon, but in the meantime, I can disclose what will be happening in the first D1 event.

Accumulation—MG204 edition

To those of you who have signed up, you will be playing in an accumulation style game to encourage scumhunting and game progression. Here's how it will work:
  • The game will be started on post .
  • Someone who is signed up and makes post will receive points for that post
  • I (cw357) will be participating in the event.
  • The last two people on the leaderboard at the end of the event will be kicked out from future events and placed on the Wall of Shame due to their lack of contribution.
  • The event will begin sometime this evening, and conclude precisely 48 hours from then, when a new event will begin with the original number of participants minus two.

    I hope you enjoy the event and it will improve the game quality!

    Signed,
    The Cow

Vigilante wrote:

You win when all non-town players are dead, and there's at least one townie alive.
Simple Doctor wrote:
You are a Simple Doctor. Each night phase, you can target a player to protect from one killpower. Your simple modifier means this action only works on vanilla roles. Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name.

You win when all non-town players are dead, and there's at least one townie alive.
Odd-Night Doctor Even-Night Tracker wrote:
You are an Odd-Night Doctor Even-Night Tracker. Each odd numbered night phase, you may target a player to protect from one killpower. Each even numbered night phase, you can target a player to find out where they went that night. Possible results are "Player1", "Player1 and Player2", "Stayed at Home" and "No Result". Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name.

You win when all non-town players are dead, and there's at least one townie alive.
Town Joat (Doctor, Vanilla Cop, Visitor) wrote:
You are a Town Joat (Doctor, Vanilla Cop, Visitor). Each night phase, you may use one of your abilities, and may use each ability once during the game. Your doctor action protects the target. Your vanilla cop checks if the target has a vanilla role, receiving either Vanilla, Not Vanilla, or No Result. Your visitor action makes you visit the selected player. Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name.

You win when all non-town players are dead, and there's at least one townie alive.

You win when there is no living serial killer, mafia control at least half of the game, and nothing can change that.

[quote=Vigilante]
You are a [color=#0f0]Vigilante[/color]. Each night phase, you may target a player to kill. Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name.

You win when all non-town players are dead, and there's at least one townie alive.[/quote]
[quote=Simple Doctor]
You are a [color=#0f0]Simple Doctor[/color]. Each night phase, you can target a player to protect from one killpower. Your simple modifier means this action only works on vanilla roles. Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name.

You win when all non-town players are dead, and there's at least one townie alive.[/quote]
[quote=Odd-Night Doctor Even-Night Tracker]
You are an [color=#0f0]Odd-Night Doctor Even-Night Tracker[/color]. Each odd numbered night phase, you may target a player to protect from one killpower. Each even numbered night phase, you can target a player to find out where they went that night. Possible results are "Player1", "Player1 and Player2", "Stayed at Home" and "No Result". Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name.

You win when all non-town players are dead, and there's at least one townie alive.[/quote]
[quote=Town Joat (Doctor, Vanilla Cop, Visitor)]
You are a [color=#0f0]Town Joat (Doctor, Vanilla Cop, Visitor)[/color]. Each night phase, you may use one of your abilities, and may use each ability once during the game. Your doctor action protects the target. Your vanilla cop checks if the target has a vanilla role, receiving either Vanilla, Not Vanilla, or No Result. Your visitor action makes you visit the selected player. Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name.

You win when all non-town players are dead, and there's at least one townie alive.[/quote]
[quote=Mafia Tracker]
You are a [color=#f00]Mafia Tracker[/color]. Each night you can target a player to find out where they went that night, and may do this along side the factional kill. Possible results are "Player1", "Player1 and Player2", "Stayed at Home" and "No Result". Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name, or by posting in the mafia PT.

You win when there is no living serial killer, mafia control at least half of the game, and nothing can change that.[/quote]
[quote=Mafia Odd-Night Follower]
You are a [color=#f00]Mafia Odd-Night Follower[/color]. Each odd numbered night you can target a player to find out what type of action they did that night, and may do this along side the factional kill. Possible results are Role-Investigative, Action-Investigative, Protective, Blocking, Jailkeep, Killing, Other, and "No result". If they did multiple different actions, you would receive a list. Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name, or by posting in the mafia PT.

You win when there is no living serial killer, mafia control at least half of the game, and nothing can change that.[/quote]
[quote=Mafia Goon]
You are a [color=#f00]Mafia Goon[/color]. You have no night abilities, but may submit the factional kill. Confirm by responding to this pm with your role name, or by posting in the mafia PT.

You win when there is no living serial killer, mafia control at least half of the game, and nothing can change that.[/quote][/hide][/hide]

Also, I do not want fake gamethrowing to ever become a valid tactic in a game. It's fine to go out as scum as say who you think scum are. It's fine to call random people your scum partners, or even the actual scum. It's not fine to do it in a way that makes it appear that you are playing against your wincon. In any case, saying stuff like "modkill me" is certainly against the spirit of the game.
